item.title: PDF Form
item.description: The layout, workflow, and contents of this PDF form was determined another department, but I was responsible for creating a native JavaScript library to drastically reduce the validation process for Quality Assurance. These forms were provided to field service engineers to complete after every assignment. This document is for reference only. Some information has been redacted. Programs used: Adobe Acrobat Pro Adobe Dreamweaver PDF form with custom input validation
